steps.name: python -m pip show software-grimoire
steps.stdout:
Name: software-grimoire
Version: 3.0.0
Summary: Operative vocabulary, prompt-spells, and stackcraft for AI-assisted software engineering.
Home-page: 
Author: Corben Sorenson
Author-email: 
License: MIT
Location: /private/var/folders/8t/2fvtl90j4b7d1r83tm2348yw0000gn/T/grimoire-package-check-u5g4xk0v/venv/lib/python3.9/site-packages
Requires: jsonschema, pytest
Required-by:

steps.name: grimoire --help
steps.stdout:
usage: grimoire [-h]
                {generate,validate,seal,new,export,bench,seals,render,test,all}
                ...

Software Grimoire maintenance CLI

positional arguments:
  {generate,validate,seal,new,export,bench,seals,render,test,all}
    generate            regenerate Quarto pages and structured data
    validate            validate repository data or one spell/stack JSON file
    seal                compute a working seal for one spell or stack JSON
                        file
    new                 create a local scaffold
    export              list generated installable exports
    bench               bench utilities
    seals               regenerate seal summary data
    render              render the Quarto site
    test                run repository tests
    all                 generate, validate, render, and test

optional arguments:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit

steps.name: grimoire-install-assets --help
steps.stdout:
usage: grimoire-install-assets [-h]
                               [--target {all,claude-code,codex,cursor,markdown,prompts,stacks}]
                               --dest DEST [--write] [--force]

Install generated Software Grimoire assets

optional arguments:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --target {all,claude-code,codex,cursor,markdown,prompts,stacks}
  --dest DEST           destination directory
  --write               actually copy files; default is dry-run
  --force               overwrite existing files, keeping a .bak copy

steps.name: grimoire-run-bench --help
steps.stdout:
usage: grimoire-run-bench [-h]
                          {evaluations,jailbreak-resilience,execution,all,import}
                          ...

Bench v2 facade for Software Grimoire evaluations.

positional arguments:
  {evaluations,jailbreak-resilience,execution,all,import}
    evaluations         run field-spell evaluations
    jailbreak-resilience
                        run jailbreak-resilience bench
    execution           run execution-graded clean/trap bench
    all                 run all project-owned benches
    import              validate a manual reviewer-supplied run record

optional arguments:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
